_README: Per-team editorial knowledge base. Copy this file to <slug>.json where <slug> matches the team's URL (e.g. argentina.json, congo-dr -> see lib/teams.ts slug). Every field is optional — fill what you have, the team page renders only what's present. This is DISPLAY content and never feeds the prediction model (per PIPELINE.md, model inputs live in agents/polymarket/refdata/ and must clear the backtest gate).
summary: One or two sentences framing the team's tournament outlook.
style: Formation and playing identity, e.g. '4-3-3, high press, build from the back'.

counterReliance.note: Short scouting phrase, e.g. 'devastating pace on the counter'. Display-only 2026 tag, never a model input.

tactics: Longer free-form tactical read — how they want to play, in/out of possession, set pieces.
mismatch: Where this side is tactically vulnerable or dominant vs typical opponents.
xFactor: The single thing most likely to swing their tournament up or down.
notes: Free-form scouting notes, found quotes, links to dig into later.
sources: Optional: where the above came from
